_meta.description: Single source of truth for all MCP server configurations. Edit here, then run `npm run sync:configs` to propagate to all tool config files.

context7._purpose: Fetches current library/framework documentation. AI calls this automatically when you reference a package name.

sdlc-gitmcp._purpose: Live read access to the sdlc-mcp GitHub repo via GitMCP. Lets any tool read sdlc/ templates, ADRs, sprint docs, and pick up SDLC state across sessions. No local server needed — SSE over HTTPS.
sdlc-gitmcp._setup_note: Replace YOUR_USERNAME with your GitHub username. No command/args — uses url + type only.

roo.notes: Install via: cp config/roo-mcp.json .roo/mcp.json in each project

cursor.notes: Install via: cp config/cursor-mcp.json .cursor/mcp.json in each project
